response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and geospatial experience with open-source contributions like GISCollective, but lacks direct commercial C++/Rust experience in routing/navigation systems. His distributed systems and low-latency work at Sociomantic and Altom are relevant, though the role prioritizes deeper C++/geospatial pipeline expertise.
strengths: Proven geospatial experience via GISCollective and Green Map projects, aligning with navigation data pipelines.
Strong distributed systems background (e.g., Sociomantic's micro-services handling millions of requests/sec).
Diverse technical adaptability (C++, Dlang, Node.js) and open-source contributions demonstrate problem-solving rigor.
concerns: Primary expertise in TypeScript/Node.js and Dlang, with limited commercial C++/Rust experience for this role.
No explicit mention of routing/navigation systems or tile optimization in past roles.
Recent work leans toward full-stack/AI tooling, diverging from the role's core geospatial data pipeline focus.
